attributes.action: Make it compulsory for food retailers to give food away rather than waste it
attributes.additional_details: After numerous attempts to ask retailers to stop throwing food away and being fobbed off with corporate jargon, it’s time to ask questions in Parliament and provoke retailers to defend their policies.
attributes.background: To pass a law making it illegal for retailers to throw food away, similar to France that have had a law in place since 2016

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban all supermarkets from throwing away edible food & require their donation
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/755710
